title: 🌀 Hyper-Meaning Vortices
name: Hyper-Meaning Vortices
what_it_is: Concentrated nexuses of excessive symbolic charge—so overloaded with potential meaning they become incomprehensible or dangerous.
how_to_use: his mind brushed the vortex and came back mythic—but broken
she stood at the center where all metaphors meet—unable to move
animation_behavior: Text spirals inward, environment overloads with symbols, viewers glitch from exposure ---
